creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
irc/ezbounce FIX BROKEN MASTER_SITES

irc/ezbounce

MASTER_SITES (linuxftw.com) is broken.
linuxftw.com is dark, and hasn't had an IP address for ~6mos.
ezbounce.net, which is another pointer, is only a 403 to linuxftw.com.
ezbounce also has an SF project. But has no dist file. Only a CVS repo.

Essentially, this project has been abandoned. I've got the source,
and the latest tarball. So I'll continue it's development. In the
meantime, I'll host the DISTFILE.

Changes in the svn(1) diff(1) attached:

Makefile - MASTER_SITES

pkg-descr - WWW

That's All Folks!

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
